title: Minecraft Extended Data Pack
description: Various recipes intended for use in the Minecraft Extended modpack. Feel free to use for your own projects though.
body:
# Minecraft Extended Data Pack

It's intended for use in my modpack [Minecraft Extended](https://modrinth.com/modpack/minecraft-extended) for the sake of adding recipes to make the pack feel more cohesive. I thought this might have changes that other people would find useful though so it's separated into it's own project so that others can have easier access to my changes.

# Whats Added?

## Worldgen

End cities attempt to spawn more frequently

## Recipes

ender pearls can be crushed into ender shards from Better End using Create

ender shards can be crushed into ender dust from Better End using Create
